title: senecio nemorensis subsp. jacquinianus
intro: Senecio nemorensis subsp. jacquinianus, also known as Wood Germander, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Wood Germander include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. Wood Germander is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
